# Brand Context Reference

<!-- Updated: 2026-02-23 -->
<!-- This file defines the branding.md format created by /ads-creative -->

## Purpose

Brand context enables personalized creative briefs, ad copy, and audit recommendations.
Without branding.md, creative output is generic. With it, output matches brand voice, colors,
audience, and positioning.

## Detection

`./branding.md` in the project root. Created automatically by `/ads-creative` if not found.

## branding.md Canonical Format

```markdown
# Brand Context — [Brand Name]

<!-- Generated by /ads-creative on [DATE] -->

## Brand Identity

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Brand Name | |
| Industry | |
| Website | |
| Tagline / Slogan | |
| Founded | |
| Business Model | [SaaS / E-commerce / Service / B2B / B2C / Hybrid] |

## Visual Identity

### Brand Colors
| Role | Color | Hex | Usage |
|------|-------|-----|-------|
| Primary | | #______ | Main brand color, CTAs, headers |
| Secondary | | #______ | Accents, supporting elements |
| Background | | #______ | Page/card backgrounds |
| Text | | #______ | Body text, headlines |
| Accent | | #______ | Highlights, badges, alerts |

### Typography
| Role | Font | Fallback |
|------|------|----------|
| Headlines | | Sans-serif |
| Body | | Sans-serif |
| Display / Logo | | — |

### Visual Style
- **Photography style**: [lifestyle / studio / user-generated / illustrated / mixed]
- **Illustration style**: [flat / 3D / hand-drawn / none]
- **Logo description**: [describe logo for AI creative tools]
- **Logo placement**: [top-left / centered / bottom-right / per-platform]

## Brand Voice

### Tone & Personality
| Dimension | Position (1-10) |
|-----------|----------------|
| Formal ←→ Casual | |
| Serious ←→ Playful | |
| Technical ←→ Simple | |
| Reserved ←→ Bold | |
| Corporate ←→ Human | |

### Messaging Guidelines
- **Do**: [list 3-5 voice characteristics to use]
- **Don't**: [list 3-5 things to avoid]
- **Brand words**: [words that define the brand — always use]
- **Forbidden words**: [words to never use in ads]

## Target Audience

### Primary Persona
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Name/Label | |
| Role / Title | |
| Age Range | |
| Key Pain Points | |
| Goals | |
| Where they spend time | [platforms, communities] |
| Decision triggers | [what makes them act] |

### Secondary Persona (optional)
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Name/Label | |
| Role / Title | |
| Age Range | |
| Key Pain Points | |
| Goals | |

## Value Proposition

### Core USP
[One sentence: what makes you different and why it matters]

### Key Benefits
| Benefit | Proof Point |
|---------|------------|
| | |
| | |
| | |

### Social Proof
- [Key metric or testimonial quote]
- [Key metric or testimonial quote]
- [Key metric or testimonial quote]

## Competitor Positioning (optional)

| Competitor | Their Positioning | Our Differentiation |
|------------|-------------------|---------------------|
| | | |
| | | |
| | | |

## Ad-Specific Guidelines

### Approved CTAs
- Primary: [e.g., "Start Free Trial", "Book a Demo"]
- Secondary: [e.g., "Learn More", "See Pricing"]
- Urgency: [e.g., "Limited Time", "Ends Friday"]

### Pricing Display
- [Show pricing in ads? Yes/No]
- [Price anchoring strategy: was/now, per-month, free trial emphasis]

### Required Elements
- [e.g., "Always include trust badge", "Always show star rating"]

### Forbidden Elements
- [e.g., "Never use competitor names in ad copy", "No stock photos"]
```

## How Brand Context Is Used

### In Creative Audit & Generation (`/ads-creative`)
- Collects brand info and creates branding.md if missing
- Ad copy uses brand voice (tone dimensions)
- Visual mockup descriptions reference brand colors and typography
- CTAs pulled from approved list
- Brand consistency audit (advisory, not scored)
- Generates on-brand ad creatives via `/infographic-v2`

### In Creative Briefs (`/ads plan`)
- Headlines and descriptions use brand words, avoid forbidden words
- Audience targeting informed by persona data

### In Audits (`/ads audit`)
- **Advisory only** — brand compliance is NOT scored in health score
- Checks: color consistency, tone alignment, CTA usage, forbidden element detection
- Flagged as "Brand Consistency Note" (not PASS/FAIL)

### In Competitor Analysis (`/ads competitor`)
- Competitor positioning table informs gap analysis
- Differentiation points guide competitive ad copy
